task_completion.description: Open Wondershare EdrawMax and start a new diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is open with a blank canvas or a new flowchart document.

task_completion.description: Create the initial linear sequence of shapes and labels
task_completion.visual_evidence: An oval labeled 'Start' connected to a sequence of rectangles labeled 'Create Feature Branch', 'Write Code & Commit', 'Push Branch to Remote', and 'Open Pull Request'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Tests Pass?' conditional logic and loops
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diamond labeled 'Tests Pass?' after 'Open Pull Request'. It must have a 'No' branch leading to a rectangle labeled 'Fix Failures' (which loops back to 'Write Code & Commit') and a 'Yes' branch leading to a rectangle labeled 'Code Review'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Approved?' conditional logic and loops
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diamond labeled 'Approved?' after 'Code Review'. It must have a 'No' branch leading to a rectangle labeled 'Request Changes' (which loops back to 'Write Code & Commit') and a 'Yes' branch leading to a rectangle labeled 'Merge to Main'.

task_completion.description: Add the End shape and ensure all connections use directional arrows
task_completion.visual_evidence: An oval labeled 'End' connected after 'Merge to Main'. All connections between the shapes on the canvas must be directional arrows indicating the workflow path.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer showing the file being saved as 'git_pr_flowchart.eddx' in the '/home/ga/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the flowchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the EdrawMax toolbars, shape libraries, and canvas, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent manually built the flowchart rather than opening a pre-existing completed file
integrity.visual_evidence: A progression of screenshots showing shapes being dragged, dropped, labeled, and connected over time.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to write XML code to spoof the .eddx file
integrity.visual_evidence: The primary workspace shown in the screenshots is the EdrawMax application, not a text editor like nano, vim, or VS Code editing XML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/git_pr_flowchart.eddx. The flowchart must be synthetically created from scratch using the EdrawMax GUI. Ensure all specific shapes (ovals, rectangles, diamonds) match the exact labels requested in the task description.
